message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledging Marty's product approval">
Thanks Marty. Strong product case — the velocity impact during Steps 4-13 is a compelling reason to do this now rather than later. Good point about the glossary: the compliance check is procedural, and the next code commit will always trigger CI regardless. We're aligned.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good, Luca and I are fully aligned. No further action needed from me on this point — I will wait for the rest of the team's feedback to come in before the consensus vote.
